daily_summary.headline: Aurora and Routine Launches Dominate the Day

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: G2 level geomagnetic storm expected, offering good aurora visibility for high-latitude observers.
top_events.action: Check skies if you're above 60° latitude.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 17-29
top_events.description: SpaceX's routine Starlink satellite deployment from Vandenberg SFB.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for launch and landing.

top_events.title: Long March 7 | Tianzhou-10
top_events.description: Cargo resupply mission to the Chinese space station.
top_events.action: Follow updates for confirmation and live coverage.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
